reason: Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Loop building Observation objects from raw dicts; a malformed entry is silently dropped from the returned list with no count/log of how many were skipped.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Optional Tisserand-parameter enrichment block; failure silently omits the enrichment fields with no indication to the caller that the fields are missing due to an error rather than not being applicable.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Same Observation-from-dict filter-loop pattern as check_tisserand.py:32 -- malformed entries dropped with no visible count.
Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Same Observation-from-dict filter-loop pattern -- malformed entries dropped with no visible count.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Packed-designation parsing tries a strict format then falls back to returning the raw stripped string on parse failure; the fallback path does not indicate to the caller that parsing failed rather than succeeding.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Cache-file cleanup loop; a file that fails to unlink is simply absent from the returned `deleted` list (an implicit signal) but the specific OSError itself is never surfaced or logged.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Already self-documented in-code as intentional ("Malformed or partial files are silently skipped"), but still has no count of how many files were skipped, so a systematic parsing regression would be invisible.
Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Same Observation-from-dict filter-loop pattern -- malformed entries dropped with no visible count.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Optional orbit-quality enrichment block; failure silently omits the enrichment fields with no indication to the caller.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Optional macro-AUC metric computation for the training report; failure silently omits the metric with no note in the report that computation failed versus was inapplicable.

Pre-existing, already self-documented as an intentional optional-dependency guard ("torch not installed; CNN/T3 paths will skip gracefully") predating REL-01. Narrower and more clearly legitimate than the other entries here, but still not re-audited under REL-01 -- catalogued rather than independently re-verified.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Full-ensemble stacking prediction attempt falls back to a simpler stacking path on any failure, with no log of what the original failure was.

Pre-existing silent-swallow predating REL-01 (2026-07-16), catalogued not fixed. Writing the ensemble-stacker coefficient JSON to disk; a write failure (e.g. permissions, disk full) leaves `coef_path` unset with no error surfaced to the caller.
